task_completion.description: Verify that Wondershare EdrawMax is opened and a new drawing canvas is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application interface should be visible with a blank or active canvas for drawing.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Internet, Main Firewall, and Core Router components are added and labeled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Cloud shape labeled 'Internet', a Firewall shape labeled 'Main Firewall', and a Router shape labeled 'Core Router - 10.0.0.1' on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Switches and Servers are added and labeled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Switch shapes labeled 'Switch-DMZ - 10.0.1.1' and 'Switch-LAN - 10.0.2.1', and Server shapes labeled 'Web Server - 10.0.1.10' and 'DB Server - 10.0.2.20'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three workstations are added and labeled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three workstation/PC shapes labeled 'WS-01 - 10.0.2.101', 'WS-02 - 10.0.2.102', and 'WS-03 - 10.0.2.103'.

task_completion.description: Verify the logical connections between components and the hierarchical layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines must connect: Internet -> Main Firewall -> Core Router. Core Router must connect to both Switch-DMZ and Switch-LAN. Switch-DMZ must connect to Web Server. Switch-LAN must connect to DB Server and the three workstations. The layout must be hierarchical (Internet at the top or left, endpoints at the bottom or right).

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is saved as an .eddx file and exported as a .png file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Save As' and 'Export' dialog boxes showing the paths '/home/ga/Documents/network_topology.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/network_topology.png', or a file manager window confirming these files exist in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the EdrawMax GUI to build the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent dragging and dropping shapes from the library, using the connector tool, and typing labels manually, rather than using terminal scripts to generate the files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the actual Wondershare EdrawMax application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should clearly be Wondershare EdrawMax, not a web browser displaying a pre-existing image or a different drawing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the diagram was created from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the progressive building of the diagram shape-by-shape, rather than a single step where a complete image is pasted or imported onto the canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified expected output paths: /home/ga/Documents/network_topology.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/network_topology.png. Required component labels: 'Internet', 'Main Firewall', 'Core Router', 'Switch-DMZ', 'Switch-LAN', 'Web Server', 'DB Server', 'WS-01', 'WS-02', 'WS-03'. Required IPs in labels: '10.0.0.1', '10.0.1.1', '10.0.2.1', '10.0.1.10', '10.0.2.20', '10.0.2.101', '10.0.2.102', '10.0.2.103'.
